title: Gold Experience Requiem
description: This Ripples of the Past addon provides a way to obtain Gold Experience Requiem evolution of the Gold Experience stand
body:
Adds **Gold Experience Requiem** evolution to the GE. 
To evolve, you need to use Stand Arrow on resolve level of 4.

## Abilities
- **Life beam:** ger shoots with the beam, piercing enemies. On resolve level of 3 it also creates life forms.
- **Nullify:** a counter attack that inflicts stun. The ability cooldown will be decreased if you were hit.
- **Return to Zero:** disables the most powerful attacking stand abilities of entities around (using the timestop range). Also works with addons!
- **Passive:** inits death loop effect on a target killed by a stand. While it lasts the damage target gets will be fatal and the target will be instantly respawned.
